title: Floating Ink VR
description:
A calligraphy and painting tool for virtual reality. Write and draw on a floating canvas with a pressure-sensitive brush that behaves like real ink on paper.

Features

• Physically simulated brush: the ink stroke is the true cross-section of the brush tip pressing through the canvas surface — pressure and angle affect stroke width and shape

• Draws over other VR apps as an overlay (negligible latency increase!) — use it with your favorite VR app, in SteamVR Home, or simply with the SteamVR background grid

• Two interchangeable tips: a soft round-section bristle brush and a rigid chisel nib reed pen

• Wet-ink bleed simulation — fresh strokes spread and diffuse on the canvas in real time (adjustable by sliders)

• HSV color picker 

• Save and load drawings as PNG

• Toggleable and resizable grids for calligraphy practice

• Grab, pin, and resize the canvas freely in your space
description_short: A VR calligraphy and painting simulator overlay with physically simulated brush strokes and wet-ink bleed
